objective: Add test-only conformance from independently authored values matching only the LSLC-004R public response envelope and ordered role structure into the unchanged explicit-destination production requester/parser.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Bound test-only structural response conformance and nonclaims.
Existing test-only conformance and authority rules apply.
Existing Rusty LSL and Manifold authority separation applies.

non_scope: Production/API/activation changes; replay of any private response value; claims of stable official bytes or values; interface policy; other groups/families; retries; devices; dependencies; source inspection; broad compatibility; routing/admission; or authority.

acceptance.proof: A focused ignored test uses independently authored dynamic values with only the public envelope/role shape and verifies unchanged parser admission, correlation, finite termination, damaged rejection, and cleanup.
Focused damaged, owner, Standard, public-boundary, instruction, and workflow gates pass.

outputs: Test-only ignored production-requester conformance using independently authored values.
Sanitized structural fixture and damaged checker.
commit_policy: Keep all dynamic test values independently authored and public-safe; never derive or replay private oracle bytes or identifiers.
